description: Style NoteThese shoes from fortune are a minimalist's reinterpretation of classic shoe styles. Wear these luxurious leather shoes with slim Fit formal shirts and trousers.Product Details  Round toed black shoe with slip-on styling and stitch detail at the seams of the toe boxPadded inner with elasticated gussets at the sides of the tongueTPU outsole with an upraised heel  Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and polish or wax on leather partsDo not store in direct sunlight
